title: Agentic Sandbox Documentation
description: Runtime isolation tooling for persistent, unrestricted agent processes — preconfigured QEMU/KVM VMs, shared storage via virtiofs, and a management dashboard for orchestration.
tagline: Isolated VM runtimes for autonomous agents

welcome.headline: Isolated runtime substrate for agent operations
welcome.lead: Agentic Sandbox gives autonomous agents durable, inspectable execution environments: KVM VMs when isolation matters, containers when speed matters, and a Rust control plane that streams tasks, sessions, telemetry, and AIWG mission events.
pillars: Start Here - first-run paths, concepts, glossary, and platform support
Architecture - control plane, session model, lifecycle, roadmap, and ecosystem fit
Runtimes - KVM VMs, containers, loadouts, shared storage, and resource boundaries
Operations - deployment, monitoring, reliability, troubleshooting, telemetry, and audits
Protocols - REST, WebSocket, task orchestration, sessions, CLI, and AIWG executor contract
welcome.quote: Give agents a machine. Keep operators in control.
